limitations: No quantified AI-attributable dollar amounts, headcount, or capex figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity capped at 3.

AI use cases are named (generative AI for product development, data analytics, omni-channel demand generation) but no deployment metrics or quantified business results are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.

Risk disclosures identify specific mechanisms (retailer AI pricing algorithms, generative AI output risks, IP exposure, cybersecurity intensification) but no quantified risk figures or named governance/oversight bodies are cited, capping risk depth at 4.
Promotional/aspirational language is prevalent throughout; evidence reflects claims rather than confirmed outcomes.
